comments.post_body:
I’m excited to share that I’ve joined Insomniac Games as a Principal VFX Artist!

After 3.5 incredible years in the tech industry, I left TikTok at the end of last month to begin a new chapter in a different but creatively familiar space.

My time at TikTok was an unforgettable ride, filled with creativity, growth, and some of the most hardworking and passionate people I’ve had the privilege to work alongside. I’m deeply grateful for the experiences, the friendships, and the ambitious projects we brought to life together.

This week, I officially started at Insomniac and I’m beyond excited for the adventures and challenges ahead.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about joining Insomniac Games as a Principal VFX Artist after leaving TikTok, where they spent 3.5 years working with a talented team on various projects. The commenter is likely congratulating the individual on their new role and wishing them success in their new chapter.

comments.post_body: I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as Director of Product Development at Scientific Forming Technologies Corporation!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about a new position as Director of Product Development at Scientific Forming Technologies Corporation, likely offering congratulations or well wishes. The context is a celebratory post about a career milestone.

comments.post_body:
An exciting announcement from Artera:

It is with great pride and excitement that we announce the public launch of #ArteraAI, with $90M in funding from a syndicate of prominent tech and healthcare investors, comprised of 7 institutions (@Coatue, @Johnson & Johnson Innovation – JJDC, @Koch Disruptive Technologies, @Walden Catalyst Ventures, @TIME Ventures, @Breyer Capital, @The Factory), and 11 angel investors (@Marc Benioff, @Jim Breyer, @Lip-Bu Tan, @Chris Re, @Andy Jacques, @Amarjit Gill, @Jeff Dean, @Steve Blank, @Dennis Wong, @Clarence So, @Michael Driscoll).

At Artera, we develop medical AI tests that personalize therapy for cancer patients. Clinicians can now leverage Artera’s unique multi-modal AI tests to prognosticate patient outcomes and predict therapy benefits in patients with prostate cancer.

“We are honored to be part of what we believe to be one of the greatest advances in prostate oncology in the last 20 years.” said Marc Benioff, CEO of Salesforce.

I’m personally proud to be part of Artera’s mission because of the impact our technology can have on so many people's lives.
#ai #innovation #healthcare #tech 
Read the full announcement:
https://lnkd.in/g25Ydmv4
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to the public launch announcement of ArteraAI, a medical AI company that has received $90M in funding to develop personalized therapy tests for cancer patients. The commenter is likely congratulating Artera on this milestone and expressing support for the company's mission to improve healthcare outcomes.
